creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
The build of net/samba44 fails if net/samba-libsmbclient is also installed.

Removing the latter enables the build to work; however, this is not really feasible if kde or other packages which depend on it is also installed.

It is possible to re-add samba-libsmbclient from a package once net/samba44 has been built.
